scopeNote: Rerun validators all passed on current HEAD, and the milestone's four scrutiny reviews were refreshed against the latest worker sessions. Two prior blockers are fixed (`dealer-settlement-and-allocation-hardcut`, `supplier-payment-and-ap-settlement-hardcut` now pass), but two blocking correctness gaps remain in non-active dealer finance-read-only enforcement and degraded hybrid-receipt replay integrity.

blockingIssues.description: Non-active dealer sessions can still write through `POST /api/v1/credit/limit-requests`, because `CreditLimitRequestController.createRequest` still allows `ROLE_DEALER` and resolves the caller via `dealerPortalService.getCurrentDealer()` outside the new `/api/v1/dealer-portal/**` finance-read-only interceptor.

Hybrid dealer-receipt replay still succeeds when only a non-empty subset of canonical allocation rows survives. `recordDealerReceiptSplit()` validates journal lines but not the full persisted allocation set, so degraded partial-loss states can replay 200 without failing closed or repairing missing allocation truth.

appliedUpdates.description: Refreshed all four scrutiny review artifacts against the latest milestone worker sessions and current HEAD, recording two passes and two remaining failures.
Archived the prior round-1 scrutiny synthesis before overwriting the active milestone synthesis for this rerun.
Recorded round-2 validator outcomes and synthesized the remaining blocking scrutiny findings for orchestrator follow-up before user testing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For dealer shared-master / dealer-portal packets, require reviewers and implementers to inventory all dealer-role routes, including dealer-capable endpoints outside `/api/v1/dealer-portal/**`, before claiming non-active dealer sessions are finance-read-only only.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This rerun fixed forced-reactivation and added a dealer-portal interceptor, but scrutiny still found `POST /api/v1/credit/limit-requests` writable to non-active dealer sessions because the route lives outside the dealer-portal prefix while still using `dealerPortalService.getCurrentDealer()`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For payment-event / allocation packets with hybrid or multi-line receipts, require degraded replay proof for partial-loss allocation states, not just the all-rows-missing case.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun for `dealer-payment-event-receipt-hardcut` added replay protection for fully missing allocation rows, but scrutiny still found hybrid receipt replay succeeds when only some canonical allocation rows survive because tests covered only the zero-rows-left case.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a new `.factory/services.yaml` command immediately for the keyless dealer auto-settle fallback replay regression.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as unnecessary for this round because the underlying dealer auto-settle issue is now fixed and the observation is already covered more generally by the guidance updates about explicit keyless fallback and degraded replay proof.
